Under Japanese rules, if neither player gives in the game is declared undecided; that's still better than a clear loss.With rule sets that forbid that the same position with the same player to play occurs twice (e.g. the super ko rule) White could not have played O19 directly; but can play a 'ko' threat; so this problem results in a kind of ko struggle.RIGHT]
